body.body: Define what a TEMPLATE node looks like in the DB. Fields needed: parameter_slots (list of named inputs), expansion_schema (the habit schema fragment with {param} placeholders), produces (list of habit_types it instantiates), example_instantiation. Instantiation contract: caller provides {param: value} dict, template expands into one or more Memory nodes + seeds them. memory_type=PROCEDURAL with habit_type='template'. Output: schema spec + one worked example (WONDER template). Prereq for T-template-seed-patterns.
body.title: Design TEMPLATE Memory node structure — parameter slots, instantiation contract
body.result: 3-layer TEMPLATE node engine live: slot_manifest+expansion_schema+instantiation_contract; template_tools.py; WONDER seeded as tpl-wonder; D209
